titleStmt.title: SII 22.160: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao
No. 160. (A.R. No. 160 of 1906) SOUTH ARCOT DISTRICT, TIRUKKŌYILŪR TALUK, ELVĀNĀŚŪR. GRĀMĀRDHANĀTHA TEMPLE—ON THE NORTH WALL OF THE SAME PRĀKĀRA. MĀR. VĪRA-PĀṆḌYADĒVA—7th YEAR.

summary.p: The details of the date given as Tulā, śu. 14, Friday, Aśvati correspond to A.D. 1333, October 22, and would enable the identification of this king with the one who ascended the throne in A.D. 1326-27. This records an endowment of four pieces of land measuring 1250 kuḻi in all by Āṭkoṇḍadēvaṉ Toṇḍappiḷḷai a merchant of Tirunāvalūr in Tirumuṉaippāḍi-nāḍu to provide for the various requirements of worship in the temple of Ūrbagaṅkoṇḍaruḷiya-Nāyanār during the four festival days of the year, at the rate of ten paṇam for each festival. The rituals observed on such occasions are described; so also the articles required for hem are named such as rose-water, musk, camphor, saffron and sandal paste. The lands are said to have been purchased before gift by the donor from the legal heirs of the owner who had run away unable to pay the taxes.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrīmaṟkittimel komāṟapaṉmar tirupuvaṉaccakravatti śrīvirapāṇṭiya tevaṟku yāṇṭu 7vatu tu
lānāyaṟṟu pūrvapakṣattu catutdeśiyum veḷḷikkiḻamaiyum peṟṟa Aśvati nāḷ malāṭāṉa jaṉa
ṉāthavaḷanāṭṭu pāṉūṟkūṟṟattu brahmadeśam Iṟaivānaraiyūrāṉa śrīcoḻakeraḷac caturvedimaṅkalattu Uṭaiyār Ūrpākaṅkoṇṭaruḷiya nāyaṉār koyil śrīmāheśvara kaṇkāṇi ceyvārkkum
tāṉattārkkum tevakaṉmi koyil kaṇakkaṟkum tirumuṉaippāṭināṭṭu tirunāvalūr viyāpārikaḷil pāṉūr kiḻavaṉ Āṭkoṇṭatevaṉ toṇṭappiḷḷai Eṉ Iṉṉāyaṉāṟku pa
ttān tirunāḷil niṉṟa mutaliyār tiruvaṉantal Eḻuntaruḷi ṟṟu Aruḷi Āstāṉamaṇṭapattu Eḻuntaruḷi Iruntu tirttam prasādittu Aruḷi Iṟṟai nāḷ cāyaṟpoḻutu nāṉ Eḻu
ntaruḷappaṇṇukiṟa Upaiyat tiruppavaṉikku Āṭiyaruḷavum Amutupaṭikkum cāttuppaṭikaḷukkum niccayitta tirumeṟpūccu paṉinir kattūri kaṟpūram kuṅkumam tiru
ccāntu ceṅkaḻunīr tiruppaḷittāmam veḷḷaittāṟu tiruppaḷittāmam Amutu paṭi kaṟiamutupaṭikaḷukkum tirumāḷikai Eḻuntaruḷit tiruvulā
cceytaruḷa tiruviḷakkeṇṇaikkum Uṭalāka tirunāḷ Oṉṟukku Aṭaṅ kalukku niccayitta paṇam pattu Āṇṭu Oṉṟukku tirunāḷ nālukku ni
ccayitta paṇam 4 10 Ippaṇam nāṟpatukkum Uṭalākakkoṇṭu kuṭutta Iv vūr capaiyāril Eṭuttaḻakiyārāṉa comitevapaṭṭar piṭākai kaṭamaiyāṟṟamāṭṭā
mal Oṭippokaiyil Ivarperk kaṭamaikku Ivarkku puṇaippaṭṭa puṇai yāḷar Iṉṉāyaṉār kuṭiniṅkātevatāṉamāṉa puttūr kaṭamaippaṟṟil Ivar kāṇiyāṉa nilama
ṟa viṟkaiyil Ivarkaḷ pakkal nāṉ vilaikoṇṭa Iluppañcey taṭi Oṉṟum payaṉmaraṅkaḷum kiṇaṟu nālum kaḷar taṭi Oṉṟum kuḷaccey taṭi Oṉṟum kuṇṭil taṭi Oṉṟum Ākat taṭi
nāliṉāl mikutikkuṟaivu Uṭpaṭṭa nañcey kuḻi 1000 2 100 5 10 Ikkuḻi Āyirattu Irunūṟṟu Aimpatum tirunāmattukkāṇiyāka Ikkoyilil tāṉattār kaik koṇṭu tāṉat
tār kuṭikkaṭaittu Innilam kārpacāṉam Uḷḷiṭṭa Ivai vāraṅkoṇṭu Iṉṉilattāl varum kaṭamai Iṟainikki nikki Iṟaimikutiyāluḷḷa paṇṭaṅkaḷum kai
kkoṇṭu Inta Upaiyattukku niccayitta tirunāḷ nālukkum paṇam nāṟpatukkum Innilattil paṇṭamekoṇṭu koyilpaṇṭārattile
Iṭṭu cantirātittavaraiyum Ippaṭikoṇṭu Eḻuntaruḷivippatāka Ittaṭi nālu kuḻi Āyirattu Irunūṟṟu Aimpatum vilaikoṇṭu tirunāmattukkāṇi yāka kalve
ṭṭikkuṭutteṉ pāṉūr kiḻavaṉ Āṭkoṇṭatevaṉ toṇṭappiḷḷai Eṉ Ivai toṇṭappiḷḷai Eḻuttu Itu cantirātittavaṟ panmāhe
śvara rakṣai śubhamastu
Digital edition of SII 22.160 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
